title: mammillaria glassii subsp. ascensionis
intro: Mammillaria glassii subsp. ascensionis, commonly known as the Ascension Island pincushion cactus, is a rare species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. It is a type of succulent cactus that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Mammillaria glassii subsp. ascensionis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have various health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
